debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
M : Set β
P : WList α β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
h : @Graph.IsAugPath α β M G hM P
⊢ V(G, M) ⊆ V(G, symmDiff M P.edgeSet)

rintro v ⟨e, heM, hev⟩
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet
  · have hnef : v ≠ P.first := fun hf ↦ h.first_not_in (hf ▸ ⟨e, heM, hev⟩)
    have hnel : v ≠ P.last := fun hl ↦ h.last_not_in (hl ▸ ⟨e, heM, hev⟩)
    obtain ⟨f, hfP, hfv, hnef⟩ := h.toIsPath.exists_edge_of_mem_verts_inner (h.toIsPath.mem_verts_of_mem_edgeSet heP hev) hnef hnel
    exact ⟨f, Or.inr ⟨hfP, fun hfM ↦ hnef (hM.subsingleton_inc v ⟨heM, hev⟩ ⟨hfM, hfv⟩).symm⟩, hfv⟩
  · exact ⟨e, Or.inl ⟨heM, heP⟩, hev⟩

rintro v ⟨e, he, hve⟩

  · exact ⟨e, Or.inl ⟨he, heP⟩, hve⟩

rintro v ⟨e, heM, hve⟩
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet
  · have hne : v ≠ P.first ∧ v ≠ P.last := ⟨fun hf ↦ h.first_not_in (hf ▸ ⟨e, heM, hve⟩), fun hl ↦ h.last_not_in (hl ▸ ⟨e, heM, hve⟩)⟩
    obtain ⟨e', he'P, hve', hne_ee'⟩ := h.toIsPath.exists_edge_ne_of_mem_edgeSet_of_not_first_last heP hve hne.1 hne.2
    refine ⟨e', mem_symmDiff.mpr (Or.inr ⟨he'P, fun he'M ↦ hne_ee' (hM.subsingleton_inc v ⟨heM, hve⟩ ⟨he'M, hve'⟩)⟩), hve'⟩
  · exact ⟨e, mem_symmDiff.mpr (Or.inl ⟨heM, heP⟩), hve⟩

rintro v ⟨e, he, hv⟩
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet
  · obtain ⟨f, hf, hfv, hne⟩ := h.toIsPath.exists_other_edge heP hv (by
      rintro (rfl | rfl)
      · exact h.first_not_in ⟨e, he, hv⟩
      · exact h.last_not_in ⟨e, he, hv⟩)
    exact ⟨f, Or.inr ⟨hf, fun hfM ↦ hne (hM.subsingleton_inc v ⟨hfM, hfv⟩ ⟨he, hv⟩)⟩, hfv⟩
  · exact ⟨e, Or.inl ⟨he, heP⟩, hv⟩
